segments.text: Yeah yeah, so unlike ground moves, being able to hit aerially - that's definitely one advantage, right?
segments.original_text: 確かに確かに地上戦、地上技と違って空中で打てるっていうのが一つ利点なのか

segments.text: No no no no no no!
segments.original_text: いやいやいやいやいやいや

full_text: Yeah yeah, so unlike ground moves, being able to hit aerially - that's definitely one advantage, right? Oh, this mashing out— No no no no no no!
